title: Universal Immunoblot Analysis for Investigating Protein-AG Binding to Immunoglobulins
author: Angel A Justiz-Vaillant
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bjseknbe
materials: Gels are transferred to nitrocellulose membranes (Immobilon-Nc, pore size 0.45 µm, Sigma-Aldrich Co, St Louis, Missouri) during 71 minutes at 40 mAmps using a semi-dry electroblotter, HEP-1 Model, Owl Scientific Inc.
The nitrocellulose membranes were washed as above.
A secondary antibody (rabbit anti-chicken IgY horseradish peroxidase, Sigma Aldrich) is added at a 1:15 000 dilution.

steps.title: Aliquots of egg yolks, animal sera...
steps.instruction: Aliquots of egg yolks, animal sera or 2 µg/µl of purified immunoglobulins from birds, laboratory, wild, farm animals and pets are applied to the gels of SDS-PAGE as described elsewhere.

steps.title: The running buffer contains 25 mM...
steps.instruction: The running buffer contains 25 mM Tris, 192 mM glycine pH 8.3 and 20% methanol.

steps.title: The nitrocellulose membranes are blocked overnight...
steps.instruction: The nitrocellulose membranes are blocked overnight in 10% non-fat skim milk in PBS with 0.05% Tween-20 pH 7.4 and then washed 4x, 10 minutes with PBS-Tween 20.

steps.title: A mixture of SpA and SpG...
steps.instruction: A mixture of SpA and SpG at a concentration of 5 µg/ml is added to the membranes. A recombinant Protein-AG (SpAG) could be used instead.

steps.title: After that there is an incubation...
steps.instruction: After that there is an incubation period of 12 hours at 4°C. It may be an overnight incubation period.

steps.title: It is incubated for one hour...
steps.instruction: It is incubated for one hour at room temperature and washed as above.

steps.title: Tetramethyl-benzidine (TMB) solution is added to...
steps.instruction: Tetramethyl-benzidine (TMB) solution is added to the nitrocellulose membranes, which are then incubated in the dark for seven minutes. Then, the membranes are shaken gently and rinsed thoroughly in de-ionized water to stop the blotting process and are left to dry.

steps.title: Alternatively, Ig samples are transferred to...
steps.instruction: Alternatively, Ig samples are transferred to nitrocellulose membranes and directly probed using SpAG-HRP (diluted 1:5000) and then adding TMB (this system was mainly used for detecting avian Igs).
